---
title: "Older Releases"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
`%||%` <- function(x, y) {
  if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0 || identical(x, "")) y else x
}

main_meta <- tryCatch(
  rmarkdown::yaml_front_matter("IPBES_Data_Vision.qmd"),
  error = function(e) list()
)

version <- as.character(main_meta$version %||% Sys.getenv("IPBES_VERSION", unset = "development"))
release_date <- substr(as.character(main_meta$release_date %||% Sys.getenv("IPBES_RELEASE_DATE", unset = as.character(Sys.Date()))), 1, 10)
doi <- as.character(main_meta$doi %||% Sys.getenv("IPBES_DOI", unset = "PENDING"))
doi_url <- Sys.getenv("IPBES_DOI_URL", unset = "")
if (identical(doi_url, "") && !identical(doi, "PENDING")) {
  doi_url <- paste0("https://doi.org/", doi)
}

safe_version <- paste0("v", gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9._-]", "-", sub("^[Vv]", "", version)))
releases_dir <- Sys.getenv("IPBES_RELEASES_SOURCE_DIR", unset = "releases")
```

## Release Metadata

- **Version:** `r version`
- **Release date:** `r release_date`
- **DOI:** `r if (!identical(doi, "PENDING") && !identical(doi_url, "")) sprintf("[%s](%s)", doi, doi_url) else doi`

```{r, results='asis'}
if (knitr::is_html_output()) {
  cat(
    "<p>",
    "<a href=\"index.html\">Vision</a>",
    " | ",
    "<a href=\"older-releases.html\">Older Releases</a>",
    " | ",
    "<a href=\"assets/IPBES-Data-Management-Vision-latest.pdf\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">Latest PDF</a>",
    "</p>",
    sep = ""
  )
}
```

## Download Older Release PDFs

```{r, results='asis'}
if (!dir.exists(releases_dir)) {
  cat("No releases directory found yet.")
} else {
  files <- list.files(
    releases_dir,
    pattern = "^IPBES-Data-Management-Vision-v[0-9].*[.]pdf$",
    full.names = TRUE
  )
  files <- files[file.exists(files)]
  files <- files[!grepl("latest[.]pdf$", basename(files), ignore.case = TRUE)]

  if (length(files) == 0) {
    cat("No released PDFs available yet.")
  } else {
    versions <- sub("^IPBES-Data-Management-Vision-(v[0-9].*)[.]pdf$", "\\1", basename(files))
    is_current <- versions == safe_version
    files <- files[!is_current]
    versions <- versions[!is_current]

    if (length(files) == 0) {
      cat("No older released PDFs available yet.")
    } else {
      info <- file.info(files)
      ord <- order(info$mtime, decreasing = TRUE)
      files <- files[ord]
      versions <- versions[ord]
      info <- info[ord, , drop = FALSE]

      rel_paths <- file.path("releases", basename(files))
      size_mb <- round(info$size / (1024^2), 2)
      modified <- format(info$mtime, "%Y-%m-%d")
      link <- sprintf("<a href=\"%s\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">Download PDF</a>", rel_paths)

      out <- data.frame(
        Version = versions,
        Date = modified,
        Size_MB = size_mb,
        PDF = link,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )

      print(knitr::kable(out, escape = FALSE))
    }
  }
}
```
